entry.title: New IDC GS00Q14OADS133 awarded to APOGEE ENGINEERING, LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Only Contracting Officers with delegated ordering authority from the Small Business GWAC Center

ns1:contractData.ns1:majorProgramCode: ONE ACQUISITION SOLUTION FOR INTEGRATED SERVICES SMALL BUSINESS
ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ONE ACQUISITION SOLUTION FOR INTEGRATED SERVICES (OASIS) PROFESSIONAL SERVICES MULTIPLE AGENCY CONTRACT, IGF::OT::IGF

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES
